Profile

Hi, I'm Phl2n.
BD. Builder. Gamer.

I do Business Development, Lead Community Management, and KOL Management — building communities, managing key opinion leaders, forging partnerships, and growing gaming ecosystems from the ground up.

Co-Founder of APHweb3 — building at the intersection of gaming, community, and Web3.

🏆 Career Highlight

Built Seedify Gaming from the ground up — zero to 12,000 organic followers, completely from scratch.
